title: Rroshm
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Rroshm''' was a slow moving herbivore native to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk's]] [[Shadowlands/Legends|Shadowlands]]<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> and was known to eat [[Bridal-veil]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
